title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #1, Saturn, Robin, Unknown person #2, Lucci as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all need to get off this island....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's going on Sir Sentou- Maru?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are there pacifistas deployed all over the island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Long ago... There was this land called "ohara"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day it just vanished off the world map.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Because they defied the world government!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the island of Ohara, which had the world's largest historical library,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island's scholars and other residents who decided to decipher the "poneglyphs" which were forbidden by the world government,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All lost their lives to an attack by the Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The lone Survivor was a young girl named nice Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: them going after old man punk, the smartest man in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...means they've weighed all the possible conse- quences and decided it's time to erase HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If so, then an incident much worse than that incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell are these guys?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
